Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Soneson C, Pagès H, Tenenbaum D, Obenchain V, Carlson M, Morgan M, Hester J, Carey V, Gatto L, Baldoni P, Drnevich J, Castelo R, Stadler M, Almeida-Silva F, Serizay J (2025). BiocHowTo: A Collection of How To Documents For Bioconductor. R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/bioconductor/BiocHowTo. 

@Manual{,
  title = {BiocHowTo: A Collection of How To Documents For Bioconductor},
  author = {Charlotte Soneson and Hervé Pagès and Dan Tenenbaum and Valerie Obenchain and Marc Carlson and Martin Morgan and James Hester and Vince Carey and Laurent Gatto and Pedro Baldoni and Jenny Drnevich and Robert Castelo and Michael Stadler and Fabricio Almeida-Silva and Jacques Serizay},
  year = {2025},

On this page
